title: Harpy Express More Shooter Punishments
description: This mod is an addon for The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express by doctor4t that adds 2 new punishments if you shoot an innocent!
body:
This is a relatively simple that allows you to switch between 3 different punishments for shooting an innocent (as an innocent):
1. Default - You drop your gun and cannot pick it back up. You can still pick up guns other players drop.
2. Prevent Gun Pickup - You drop your gun and cannot pick up any guns for the rest of the round.
3. Kill Shooter - You die along with the player you shot.

The selected punishment only applies if backfire does not meaining that this addon and backfire work together!

# Commands
`/setShootInnocentPunishment [default/preventGunPickup/killShooter]` - Requires OP.

For support or suggestions, join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/ZbwgdH8mNQ)!
